component.name: VGP
component.summary: GPU-accelerated vector display server and desktop environment

description.p: VGP is a vector-rendered display server and desktop environment for Linux. Every pixel is vector-drawn: windows are translucent plexiglass panes, apps are F-16 HUD/MFD style interfaces, and text uses a stroke font.
VGP runs directly on DRM/KMS with GBM/EGL, no X11 or Wayland required. Bundled apps include a terminal, file manager, text editor, launcher, system monitor, settings, and status bar.
